title: ACP Event Envelope
description: The universal envelope for all Agent Collaboration Protocol events.

run_id.description: Unique identifier for this agent run or workflow execution.

agent_id.description: URI identifying the agent that emitted this event. Format: agent://<name>

event_type.description: Which ACP primitive this event represents.

sequence.description: Monotonically increasing sequence number within a run.

parent_event_id.description: Optional reference to a prior event this is responding to.

payload.description: Event-type-specific data. See individual primitive schemas.
